name: Juan Camilo Codina Ariza
title: Senior Frontend/Fullstack Developer and Development Lead
bioShort: Senior Frontend/Fullstack developer with 4+ years building modern web apps and scalable platforms. I lead teams and use AI as a real lever for speed and quality.
bioLong: Senior Frontend/Fullstack developer with more than 4 years of experience building modern web applications and scalable platforms in agile environments. Specialized in TypeScript, React and Next.js (SSR, SSG and ISR), with robust architectures focused on user experience. Proven experience leading teams, integrating payment gateways, collaborating with UX/UI teams and optimizing SEO and performance on high-traffic applications.

photo.alt: Portrait of Juan Camilo Codina Ariza

experience.summary: Promoted to Development Lead, mentoring a team of up to 3 people. Led the architecture of a commercial and financial quoting ecosystem (Roofing, Water, Solar/PPA), the Website 2.0 with Next.js (SSR/SSG), payment gateway integration and data sync to Zoho CRM via REST APIs.
Pixel-perfect interfaces from Figma in a remote, distributed team. SEO and Core Web Vitals optimization with TypeScript, React Query and Tailwind; accessible forms (WCAG) with React Hook Form.

experience.company: Engineering for the Management and Environmental Soil S.A.S.
experience.summary: Urban-financial simulation web platform: municipality classification, interactive map viewer, geographic data API and cost simulations documented end to end.
IVR systems with Avaya Orchestration Designer and backend services with Spring Boot, tracking tickets in Jira under an agile approach.
